Metalix Print

UploadPrice it instantlyWe deliver

Shop open
⚡ Ready in 3–4 hrs

Print documents online with Metalix Print

Upload a PDF, Word, or PowerPoint file, configure how you want it printed, and pay online — we take it from there.

📄
PDF Printing
Upload any PDF and we'll detect pages and color automatically.
📝
Word Printing
.doc and .docx documents, converted and printed accurately.
📊
PowerPoint Printing
.ppt and .pptx slide decks, one page per slide.
🎨
Color Printing
Full-color pages for presentations, charts, and photos.
⚫
Black & White Printing
The cheapest option for text-heavy documents.
📦
Bulk Printing
Up to 999 copies per order, single or double sided.

How it works

1
Upload document
PDF, Word or PowerPoint — drag & drop or browse
2
Configure print settings
Orientation, color, sides, copies, paper size
3
Pay online
Secure checkout via Razorpay
4
Printing begins
Your order is queued for printing automatically
5
Pickup or delivery
Collect in-store or get it delivered to your door
